title: bridge-jmap email_query: all_ids unbounded → OOM on large mailbox
description: email_query accumulates all page IDs into all_ids without a cap. The seen_ids filter that prevents reprocessing runs later in the caller; email_query itself has no limit. A JMAP server with 100k+ emails in the mailbox (or an adversarial server) causes all_ids to grow to hundreds of thousands of strings before any filtering occurs, potentially exhausting process memory. Trigger: very large JMAP mailbox or adversarial server. Bad behavior: bridge-jmap OOM-killed.
